summary_one_line: Input must contain the literal ASCII string "Content-Type" so Curl_checkheaders returns non-NULL and cthdr passes the if-guard.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A request body containing the literal header name "Content-Type" (the 12-byte ASCII run C-o-n-t-e-n-t---T-y-p) so that Curl_checkheaders(data, STRCONST("Content-Type")) returns a non-NULL pointer and the if(cthdr) guard at http.c:2380 takes its true side.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving seeds carry the exact ASCII bytes 47 43 6f 6e 74 65 6e 74 2d 54 79 70 ("GContent-Typ") at offsets 0x24-0x2f; the BYTE DIFF shows W is fully concentrated on these literal bytes (47(G)x20, 43(C)x20, 6f(o)x20, ...) while every L distribution at the same offsets is scattered, so the Content-Type token is present in W and absent in L.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: All loser-blocking seeds take the false branch (L2380 T=0 F=20) and at offsets 0x24-0x2c the L byte sets are dominated by zeros/dashes/garbage (00, 2e, fe, eb, ff) rather than the Content-Type literal, so Curl_checkheaders finds no matching header and returns NULL, blocking the true side.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc intercept the strcmp/memcmp inside Curl_checkheaders comparing the input header against the constant "Content-Type", record both operands in the CmpLogObserver buffer, and I2SRandReplace substitutes the constant into the input at the matching offset; naive and value_profile lack I2SRandReplace and must reconstruct the 12-byte literal by chance, which they fail to do across 10 trials.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the if(cthdr) guard at http.c:2380 whose true side is globally blocked.
cthdr is the return value of Curl_checkheaders for the "Content-Type" header.
Winner seeds contain the literal ASCII Content-Type bytes; losers do not, with W concentrated and L scattered at those offsets.
Winner-resolving seeds physically carry the Content-Type header literal in their bytes.
All winner trials take the true branch and all loser trials take the false branch at the blocker line.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L2380  T=20 F=0  T=0 F=20  if(cthdr)  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog and vpc gain I2SRandReplace which substitutes a recorded CMP operand into the input at matching offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile (the loser of pair 2) has no I2SRandReplace mutator.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 139 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed acb98175a6d3d5c3` and observed the I2S-floor signal: 2 ancestor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 10 and 11 of the ancestor chain, exclusive to cmplog/vpc under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on the presence of a fixed "Content-Type" literal where naive/value_profile resolve the branch at the same rate as cmplog/vpc, showing the literal is reachable without I2S substitution.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact byte offset where Curl_checkheaders matches the input against the constant is inferred from seed layout rather than confirmed from the parser, so the precise substitution site is uncertain.
